supabase.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Check your inbox (and spam folder)
supabase.userAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists
supabase.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
supabase.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again
supabase.invalidEmail: That email address doesn't look valid
supabase.sessionMissing: Your session has expired. Log in again
supabase.tokenExpired: The link has expired. Request a new one
supabase.passwordSameAsOld: The new password must differ from the current one

generic.networkError: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection
generic.serverError: The server returned an error. Try again shortly

api.flash_deadline_day_only: Flash auctions are only available during Deadline Day
api.rider_retired_auction: This rider has retired and can't be put up for auction
api.rider_pending_transfer_auction: This rider was won at auction and is awaiting transfer to the new team
api.rider_other_manager: This rider belongs to another manager
api.rider_has_active_auction: This rider already has an active auction
api.rider_in_open_swap_auction: This rider is offered in an open swap. Withdraw the swap offer before starting an auction
api.rider_on_auction_transfer: This rider is on an active auction. Bid on the auction instead of making a transfer offer.
api.start_price_own_range: Starting price must be between 0 and the rider's Value ({value} CZ$)
api.start_price_min_value: Starting price must at least match the rider's Value ({value} CZ$)
api.start_bid_exceeds_balance: The starting bid exceeds your available balance, including active auction leads
api.auction_not_active: This auction is no longer active
api.cannot_bid_own_rider: You can't bid on your own rider
api.bid_below_minimum: Bid must be at least {min} CZ$
api.insufficient_balance_after_bids: You have {available} CZ$ left after your existing bids
api.bid_save_failed: Your bid couldn't be saved. Try again.
api.cannot_proxy_own_rider: You can't set an auto-bid on your own rider
api.proxy_below_minimum: Max limit must be at least {min} CZ$
api.insufficient_balance_after_proxy: You have {available} CZ$ left after your existing bids and auto-bids
api.proxy_save_failed: Your auto-bid couldn't be saved. Try again.
api.proxy_place_failed: Your auto-bid couldn't be placed. Try again.
api.proxy_update_failed: Your auto-bid couldn't update the auction. Try again.
api.rate_bid: Too many bids in a short time. Try again in a moment.
api.rate_market: Too many market actions in a short time. Wait a moment.
api.rate_board: Too many board actions in a short time. Wait a moment.
api.rate_request: Too many requests in a short time. Wait a moment.
api.rider_retired_listing: This rider has retired and can't be listed for sale
api.rider_already_listed: This rider is already listed on the transfer market
api.cannot_bid_own_listing: You can't bid on your own listing
api.rider_not_found_or_no_team: Rider not found or has no team
api.rider_retired_trade: This rider has retired and can't be traded
api.ai_rider_no_direct_offer: AI riders can't receive direct offers. Start or bid on an auction instead.
api.squad_full: Your squad is full ({effectiveCap} riders, Div {division} cap {maxRiders})
api.squad_full_buffer: Your squad is full ({effectiveCap} riders, Div {division} cap {maxRiders} + {buffer} buffer during the transfer window)
api.squad_full_bid: Your squad is full ({maxRiders} riders). Sell a rider before you bid on a new one.
api.not_involved_offer: You're not involved in this offer
api.only_closed_offers_archivable: Only closed offers can be archived
api.deal_locked_both_confirmed: The deal has been accepted by both parties and can't be cancelled by a manager
api.offered_rider_not_owned: Your offered rider doesn't belong to your team
api.offered_rider_retired: Your offered rider has retired and can't be traded
api.target_rider_not_found: Target rider not found or has no team
api.target_rider_retired: The target rider has retired and can't be traded
api.ai_rider_no_swap: AI riders can't take part in direct swaps. Use auctions instead.
api.offered_rider_on_auction: Your offered rider is in an active auction and can't be offered in a swap until the auction has ended
api.requested_rider_on_auction: The target rider is in an active auction and can't be part of a swap until the auction has ended
api.cannot_afford_cash_adjustment: You can't afford the requested cash payment
api.not_involved_swap: You're not involved in this swap
api.swap_locked_both_confirmed: The swap has been accepted by both parties and can't be cancelled by a manager
api.loan_max_one_season: A loan can cover one season at most. Set the start and end to the same season number.
api.rider_retired_loan: This rider has retired and can't be loaned
api.cannot_loan_own_rider: You can't loan your own rider
api.rider_already_loaned: This rider is already on loan or has a pending loan proposal
api.squad_full_loan_propose: Your squad is full ({effectiveCap} riders, Div {division} cap {maxRiders}). The loan can't be created.
api.squad_full_loan_propose_buffer: Your squad is full ({effectiveCap} riders, Div {division} cap {maxRiders} + {buffer} buffer during the transfer window). The loan can't be created.
api.not_involved_loan: You're not involved in this loan
api.squad_full_loan_accept: The borrower's squad is full ({effectiveCap} riders, Div {division} cap {maxRiders}). The loan can't be activated.
api.squad_full_loan_accept_buffer: The borrower's squad is full ({effectiveCap} riders, Div {division} cap {maxRiders} + {buffer} buffer during the transfer window). The loan can't be activated.
api.loan_fee_insufficient: The borrower only has {available} CZ$ available after active bids and can't pay the loan fee of {fee} CZ$
api.loan_active_no_unilateral_cancel: This loan is active and can't be cancelled unilaterally. Contact an admin.
api.buyout_insufficient: You only have {available} CZ$ available after active bids and can't exercise the buy option of {price} CZ$
api.buyout_rider_unavailable: This rider is no longer available for the buy option; it's already part of another deal.
api.seller_no_longer_owns_rider: The seller no longer owns the rider; the deal has been cancelled
api.seller_squad_too_small: The seller can't drop below {minRiders} riders in Division {division}; the deal has been cancelled
api.buyer_squad_full: The buyer's squad can hold at most {maxRiders} riders in Division {division}; the deal has been cancelled
api.buyer_insufficient_balance: The buyer can no longer afford it; the deal has been cancelled
api.offered_rider_moved: Your offered rider no longer belongs to your team; the swap has been cancelled
api.requested_rider_moved: The requested rider no longer belongs to the other team; the swap has been cancelled
api.proposing_insufficient_balance: The proposing team can no longer afford it; the swap has been cancelled
api.receiving_insufficient_balance: The receiving team can no longer afford it; the swap has been cancelled
api.stale_rider_state: The rider changed status during confirmation; the deal has been cancelled
api.stale_offered_rider_state: The offered rider changed status during confirmation; the swap has been cancelled
api.stale_requested_rider_state: The requested rider changed status during confirmation; the swap has been cancelled
api.not_involved: You're not involved in this deal
api.board_dna_required_plan: You must choose your club DNA before negotiating the board plan
api.board_dna_required_sign: You must choose your club DNA before signing the board plan
api.board_renegotiation_locked_window: The season's final phase has begun. The board plan can't be renegotiated in the last {raceDays} race days.
api.board_renegotiation_locked_progress: The board plan can't be renegotiated mid-season (once {percent}% of the season has been raced). Wait until the plan expires or the season ends.
api.dna_requires_season_1: You must finish season 1 before choosing your club DNA
api.dna_already_chosen: Your club DNA is already set and can't be changed yet
api.invalid_asking_price: The asking price must be a positive whole number
api.team_transfer_frozen: Your team is frozen because its debt is over the division ceiling. Reduce your debt before trading.
